data.name: BadObjectName
data.value: I don't understand that object name.

data.name: AmbiguousMatch
data.value: I don't know which one you mean.

data.name: DontKnowWhichYouMean
data.value: I don't know which {0} you mean!

data.name: DontSeeWhatYouWantToLock
data.value: I don't see what you want to lock!

data.name: DontKnowWhichOneToLock
data.value: I don't know which one you want to lock!

data.name: DontKnowWhoYouMean
data.value: I don't know who you mean!

data.name: MustBePlayer
data.value: New owner must be a player.

data.name: NotMarkedForDestruction
data.value: That object is not marked for destruction.

data.name: NoPermission
data.value: You don't have permission to do that.

data.name: YouDoNotControlThatObject
data.value: You do not control that object.

data.name: DontPassLinkLock
data.value: You don't pass the link lock.

data.name: PermissionDeniedCannotZoneTo
data.value: Permission denied: You cannot zone to that object.

data.name: PermissionDeniedSetAttribute
data.value: Permission denied to set attribute on {0}.

data.name: LackSpoofingPermissions
data.value: Permission denied: You lack spoofing permissions.

data.name: AttributeCannotBeChanged
data.value: That attribute cannot be changed by you.

data.name: AttributePermissionsCannotBeChanged
data.value: That attribute's permissions cannot be changed.

data.name: NoPermissionToChown
data.value: You don't have the permission to chown that.

data.name: CantRemakeWorld
data.value: You can't remake the world in your image.

data.name: CannotDoWhileGagged
data.value: You cannot do that while gagged.

data.name: HavenFlagSet
data.value: You are set HAVEN and cannot receive pages.

data.name: InvalidDbref
data.value: That's not a valid object reference.

data.name: DontUnderstandListOfTypes
data.value: I don't understand the list of types.

data.name: DontUnderstandWhatYouWantToList
data.value: I don't understand what you want to @list.

data.name: DontUnderstandWhatYouWantToDo
data.value: I don't understand what you want to do.

data.name: PlayerNameInUse
data.value: That player name is already in use.

data.name: PlayerAliasInUse
data.value: That player alias is already in use.

data.name: DontRecognizeThatChannel
data.value: CHAT: I don't recognize that channel.

data.name: DontKnowWhichChannel
data.value: CHAT: I don't know which channel you mean.

data.name: DontThinkWantsToHearFrom
data.value: I don't think #{0} wants to hear from {1}.

data.name: NotEnoughMoneyToLink
data.value: You don't have enough {0} to link.

data.name: CantBuyThingsByTakingMoney
data.value: You can't buy things by taking money.

data.name: NotAnAdmin
data.value: You don't look like an admin to me.

data.name: CantAliasCommandToThat
data.value: I can't alias a command to that!

data.name: CantMakeMultipleRequests
data.value: You can't make multiple requests at the same time!

data.name: GuestCantDestroy
data.value: I'm sorry, Dave, I'm afraid I can't do that.

data.name: AlreadyDestroyed
data.value: Destroying that again is hardly necessary.

data.name: TooSpecialToDestroy
data.value: That is too special to be destroyed.

data.name: AmbiguousExitDirection
data.value: I don't know which way you mean!

data.name: TeleportsNotAllowed
data.value: Teleports are not allowed in this room.

data.name: NoZoneTeleport
data.value: You may not teleport out of the zone from this room.

data.name: InTheVoid
data.value: You're in the Void. This is not a good thing.

data.name: VoidSendingHome
data.value: You're in the void - sending you home.

data.name: CantGrantPowersUnregistered
data.value: You can't grant powers to unregistered players.

data.name: CantMakeAdminGuests
data.value: You can't make admin into guests.

data.name: WhoDoYouThinkYouAre
data.value: Who do you think you are, GOD?

data.name: NoPowerOverBodyAndMind
data.value: You do not have the power over body and mind!

data.name: GameSavingDatabase
data.value: GAME: Saving database. Game may freeze for a few moments.

data.name: GameRebootBy
data.value: GAME: Reboot w/o disconnect by {0}, please wait.

data.name: GameRebootNoDisconnect
data.value: GAME: Reboot w/o disconnect from game account, please wait.

data.name: CantSeemToDropThingsHere
data.value: You can't seem to drop things here.

data.name: CantEmptyThatFromHere
data.value: You can't empty that from here.

data.name: SafeObjectMustUnset
data.value: That object is set SAFE. You must set it !SAFE before destroying it.

data.name: SafeObjectUseNuke
data.value: That object is marked SAFE. Use @nuke to destroy it.

data.name: ChatNotOnChannel
data.value: CHAT: You are not on channel <{0}>.

data.name: ChatGuestsCantModify
data.value: CHAT: Guests may not modify channels.

data.name: InvalidPasswordText
data.value: That password is not a valid password.

data.name: ZoneCycleCannotAdd
data.value: Cannot add zone: would create a cycle.

data.name: NeedObjectAttributePair
data.value: You need to give an object/attribute pair.

data.name: AttributeNotFoundOnSourceFormat
data.value: Attribute {0} not found on source object.

data.name: FailedToCopyAttributeAny
data.value: Failed to copy attribute to any destinations.

data.name: AttributeMovedFailedRemoveFormat
data.value: Attribute moved to {0} {1} but failed to remove source: {2}

data.name: FailedToMoveAttributeAny
data.value: Failed to move attribute to any destinations.

data.name: CanOnlyChownToYourself
data.value: You can only chown an attribute to yourself.

data.name: ExitNoValidLocation
data.value: That exit doesn't go to a valid location.

data.name: CantGoThatWayContainmentLoop
data.value: You can't go that way - it would create a containment loop.

data.name: DontYouHaveAnythingToSay
data.value: Don't you have anything to say?

data.name: YouDoNotHavePermissionToSpoofEmits
data.value: You do not have permission to spoof emits.

data.name: NoSuchCommandAtLogin
data.value: No such command available at login.

data.name: YouMustProvideMatchString
data.value: You must provide a string to match when using /match.

data.name: YouMustSpecifyObjectToDecompile
data.value: You must specify an object to decompile.

data.name: YouMustSpecifyObjectToRestart
data.value: You must specify an object to restart.

data.name: AmbiguousChannelNameFormat
data.value: Ambiguous channel name '{0}'. Please be more specific.

data.name: ChatYesOrNoOnly
data.value: CHAT: Yes or No are the only valid options.

data.name: ChatNotMemberFormat
data.value: CHAT: You are not a member of {0}.

data.name: ChatCombinedChannelsOnFormat
data.value: CHAT: Combined channels turned on for {0}.

data.name: ChatCombinedChannelsOffFormat
data.value: CHAT: Combined channels turned off for {0}.

data.name: ChatAlreadyInGagStateFormat
data.value: CHAT: You are already in that gag state on {0}.

data.name: ChatGaggedOnFormat
data.value: CHAT: You have been gagged on {0}.

data.name: ChatUngaggedOnFormat
data.value: CHAT: You have been ungagged on {0}.

data.name: ChatAlreadyInHideStateFormat
data.value: CHAT: You are already in that hide state on {0}.

data.name: ChatHiddenOnChannelFormat
data.value: CHAT: You have been hidden on {0}.

data.name: ChatUnhiddenOnChannelFormat
data.value: CHAT: You have been unhidden on {0}.

data.name: NewsNoTopicAvailable
data.value: No news available. Type 'news <topic>' for news on a specific topic.

data.name: NewsTryPattern
data.value: Try 'news <pattern>' with wildcards (*) or 'news/search <text>' to search news content.

data.name: AdminCommandOnly
data.value: Permission denied. This command is for administrators only.

data.name: AhelpNoHelpAvailable
data.value: No admin help available. Type 'ahelp <topic>' for help on a specific topic.

data.name: AhelpNoEntriesFoundContaining
data.value: No admin help entries found containing '{0}'.

data.name: AhelpTryPattern
data.value: Try 'ahelp <pattern>' with wildcards (*) or 'ahelp/search <text>' to search admin help.

data.name: FlagNameAndSymbolCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Flag name and symbol cannot be empty.

data.name: FlagLetterRequiresNameAndSymbol
data.value: @FLAG/LETTER requires flag name and new symbol.

data.name: FlagNameAndSymbolEmptyError
data.value: Flag name and symbol cannot be empty.

data.name: FlagTypeRequiresNameAndTypes
data.value: @FLAG/TYPE requires flag name and type restrictions.

data.name: FlagNameAndTypesCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Flag name and types cannot be empty.

data.name: FlagNameAndPermissionsCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Flag name and permissions cannot be empty.

data.name: PowerNameAndAliasCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Power name and alias cannot be empty.

data.name: PowerAliasRequiresNameAndAlias
data.value: @POWER/ALIAS requires power name and new alias.

data.name: NoLogEntriesForCategoryFormat
data.value: No log entries found for category '{0}'.

data.name: QuotaSystemDisabled
data.value: The quota system is disabled on this server.

data.name: PlayerSetToPoorFormat
data.value: {0} has been set to poor status (quota: 0).

data.name: YourQuotaSetToZeroByFormat
data.value: Your building quota has been set to 0 by {0}.

data.name: QuotaAmountMustBeNumber
data.value: Quota amount must be a number.

data.name: ErrorDarkFlagNotFound
data.value: Error: DARK flag not found in database.

data.name: NowHiddenFromWho
data.value: You are now hidden from the WHO list.

data.name: NoLongerHiddenFromWho
data.value: You are no longer hidden from the WHO list.

data.name: AlreadyHiddenFromWho
data.value: You are already hidden from the WHO list.

data.name: AlreadyVisibleOnWho
data.value: You are already visible on the WHO list.

data.name: NeedAnnouncePower
data.value: Permission denied. You need the Announce power.

data.name: MayNotDestroyConnectedPlayer
data.value: How gruesome. You may not destroy players who are connected.

data.name: MustUseNukeToDestroyPlayer
data.value: You must use @nuke to destroy a player.

data.name: ObjectAndPossessionsScheduledDestroyedFormat
data.value: {0} and their possessions are scheduled to be destroyed.

data.name: MoneyFunctionNotSupported
data.value: The money() function is not supported. SharpMUSH does not track money or pennies.

data.name: MapMustSpecifyAttribute
data.value: You must specify an attribute to map.

data.name: MapWouldIterateFormat
data.value: @map: Would iterate over {0} elements and execute {1}/{2}

data.name: DoListWhatToDoWithList
data.value: What do you want to do with the list?

data.name: ExitNoValidLocationDetail
data.value: That exit doesn't go to a valid location.

data.name: HaltMustSpecifyPid
data.value: You must specify a process ID.

data.name: HaltMustSpecifyTarget
data.value: You must specify a target object.

data.name: NotifyMustSpecifySemaphoreObject
data.value: You must specify an object to use for the semaphore.

data.name: NotifyMustSpecifyValidObjectAttribute
data.value: You must specify a valid object with an optional valid attribute to use for the semaphore.

data.name: NotifyQregAssignmentsMustBePairs
data.value: Q-register assignments must be in pairs: qreg,value[,qreg,value...]

data.name: NotifyNoTaskWaitingOnSemaphore
data.value: No task is waiting on that semaphore.

data.name: ObjectDoesNotWantToHearFromYouFormat
data.value: {0} does not want to hear from you.

data.name: WaitWhatToDoWithProcess
data.value: What do you want to do with the process?

data.name: CommandMustSpecifyName
data.value: You must specify a command name.

data.name: CommandAddNotImplementedFormat
data.value: @command/add: Dynamic command creation not yet implemented.

data.name: CommandMustSpecifyAlias
data.value: You must specify an alias name.

data.name: CommandAliasNotImplementedFormat
data.value: @command/alias: Dynamic command aliasing not yet implemented.

data.name: CommandMustSpecifyCloneName
data.value: You must specify a clone name.

data.name: DrainCannotSpecifyBothAnyAndAttribute
data.value: You may not specify both /any and a specific attribute.

data.name: DrainCannotSpecifyBothAllAndNumber
data.value: You may not specify both /all and a number.

data.name: ForcePermissionDeniedDoNotControl
data.value: Permission denied. You do not control the target.

data.name: YouDoNotHavePermissionToSpoofEmitsDetail
data.value: You do not have permission to spoof emits.

data.name: DontYouHaveAnythingToSayDetail
data.value: Don't you have anything to say?

data.name: PsMustSpecifyPid
data.value: You must specify a process ID.

data.name: PsQueueManagementNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Queue management not yet implemented.

data.name: SelectMustSpecifyTestString
data.value: You must specify a test string.

data.name: TriggerMustSpecifyAttributePath
data.value: You must specify an object/attribute to trigger.

data.name: TriggerMustSpecifyObjectAttributePath
data.value: You must specify an object/attribute path.

data.name: TriggerPermissionDeniedDoNotControl
data.value: Permission denied. You do not control that object.

data.name: TriggerMustProvideMatchString
data.value: You must provide a string to match when using /match.

data.name: WhereIsMustSpecifyPlayer
data.value: You must specify a player to locate.

data.name: WhereIsTriedToLocateYouFormat
data.value: {0} tried to locate you, but was unable to.

data.name: ConfigUseCategoryHelp
data.value: Use '@config <category>' to see options in a category.

data.name: ConfigUseOptionHelp
data.value: Use '@config <option>' to see the value of an option.

data.name: ConfigNoCategoryOrOptionFormat
data.value: No configuration category or option named '{0}'.

data.name: EditMustSpecifySearchAndReplace
data.value: You must specify search and replace strings.

data.name: FunctionMustSpecifyName
data.value: You must specify a function name.

data.name: FunctionMustSpecifyAliasName
data.value: You must specify an alias name.

data.name: FunctionAliasingNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Function aliasing not yet implemented.

data.name: FunctionMustSpecifyCloneName
data.value: You must specify a clone name.

data.name: FunctionCloningNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Function cloning not yet implemented.

data.name: FunctionDeletionNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Function deletion not yet implemented.

data.name: FunctionDisablingNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Function disabling not yet implemented.

data.name: FunctionEnablingNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Function enabling not yet implemented.

data.name: FunctionRestrictionNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Function restriction not yet implemented.

data.name: FunctionDynamicDefinitionNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Dynamic function definition not yet implemented.

data.name: IncludeMustSpecifyAttributePath
data.value: You must specify an object/attribute to include.

data.name: IncludeMustSpecifyObjectAttributePath
data.value: You must specify an object/attribute path.

data.name: MailTooManySwitches
data.value: Error: Too many switches passed to @mail.

data.name: RestartMustSpecifyObject
data.value: You must specify an object to restart.

data.name: AttributeCommandRetroactiveNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Retroactive flag updating not yet implemented.

data.name: AttributeCommandRemovedFromTableFormat
data.value: Attribute '{0}' removed from standard attribute table.

data.name: AttributeCommandExistingCopiesRemain
data.value: Existing copies remain but are no longer "standard".

data.name: AttributeCommandMustSpecifyNewName
data.value: You must specify a new name.

data.name: AttributeCommandRenamedFormat
data.value: Attribute '{0}' renamed to '{1}' in standard attribute table.

data.name: AttributeCommandMustSpecifyPattern
data.value: You must specify a regexp pattern.

data.name: AttributeCommandLimitNewValuesMustMatch
data.value: New values must match this pattern (case insensitive)

data.name: AttributeCommandValidationNotImplemented
data.value: Note: Attribute validation not yet implemented.

data.name: AttributeCommandMustSpecifyChoices
data.value: You must specify a list of choices.

data.name: AttributeCommandMustSpecifyAtLeastOneChoice
data.value: You must specify at least one choice.

data.name: AttributeCommandEnumNewValuesMustMatch
data.value: New values must match one of these choices

data.name: AttributeCommandNotFoundNotErrorFormat
data.value: Attribute '{0}' not found in standard attribute table.

data.name: AttributeCommandNotFoundNotError2
data.value: This is not an error - the attribute may still be used on objects.

data.name: StatsTablesNotImplemented
data.value: @stats/tables: Internal table statistics not yet implemented.

data.name: StatsFlagsNotImplemented
data.value: @stats/flags: Flag system statistics not yet implemented.

data.name: ListMotdCurrentSettingsHeader
data.value: Current Message of the Day settings:

data.name: ListMotdTemporaryHeader
data.value: Temporary Message of the Day (cleared on restart):

data.name: WhereIsTriedToLocateButUnableFormat
data.value: {0} tried to locate you, but was unable to.

data.name: PowerTypeRequiresNameAndTypes
data.value: @POWER/TYPE requires power name and type restrictions.

data.name: PowerNameAndTypesCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Power name and types cannot be empty.

data.name: PowerNameAndPermissionsCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Power name and permissions cannot be empty.

data.name: SuggestCategoryAndWordCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Category and word cannot be empty.

data.name: BootDescriptorMustBeNumber
data.value: Descriptor number must be a number.

data.name: HookMustSpecifyCommandName
data.value: You must specify a command name.

data.name: HookMustSpecifyType
data.value: You must specify a hook type: /ignore, /override, /before, /after, or /extend

data.name: NewPasswordGenerateSwitchConflict
data.value: @NEWPASSWORD: /GENERATE switch cannot be used with other arguments.

data.name: PurgeCompleteFormat
data.value: Purge complete. {0} objects advanced to GOING_TWICE. {1} objects marked for final deletion.

data.name: PurgeNoteBackgroundGc
data.value: Note: Actual object deletion is handled by background garbage collection in SharpMUSH.

data.name: ShutdownOnlyGodPanic
data.value: Only God can perform a panic shutdown.

data.name: ShutdownRebootInitiated
data.value: REBOOT initiated. In SharpMUSH's web-based architecture:

data.name: ShutdownRebootDocker
data.value: - For Docker/Kubernetes: Update deployment to trigger rolling restart

data.name: ShutdownRebootStandalone
data.value: - For standalone: Restart the web application

data.name: ShutdownRebootRedis
data.value: - Player connections will be preserved via Redis state store

data.name: ShutdownParanoidArangoDB
data.value: Database state is continuously persisted in ArangoDB.

data.name: ShutdownNoteWebApp
data.value: Note: SharpMUSH runs as a web application. Traditional shutdown is not applicable.

data.name: ShutdownNoteOrchestration
data.value: In cloud/container deployments, use your orchestration tools to manage server lifecycle.

data.name: ShutdownNoteNoSave
data.value: Database state is preserved automatically. No explicit save is needed.

data.name: ChownAllCompleteFormat
data.value: Changed ownership of {0} object(s) from {1} to {2}.

data.name: DumpDoesNothing
data.value: Dump command does nothing for SharpMUSH. Consider using @backup.

data.name: PlayerCreateInvalidName
data.value: That is not a valid player name.

data.name: PlayerCreateInvalidPassword
data.value: That is not a valid password.

data.name: YourQuotaSetToByFormat
data.value: Your quota has been set to {0} by {1}.

data.name: AllQuotaSetForPlayerFormat
data.value: Your building quota has been set to {0} by {1}.

data.name: SitelockCheckRequiresHost
data.value: @SITELOCK/CHECK requires a hostname or IP address.

data.name: SitelockHostNoMatchFormat
data.value: Host '{0}' does not match any sitelock rules (default access allowed).

data.name: SitelockNameNotImplemented
data.value: @SITELOCK/NAME modification is not yet implemented. Use the admin UI to modify banned names.

data.name: SitelockBanNotImplemented
data.value: @SITELOCK/BAN modification is not yet implemented. Use the admin UI to add sitelock rules.

data.name: SitelockRegisterNotImplemented
data.value: @SITELOCK/REGISTER modification is not yet implemented. Use the admin UI to add sitelock rules.

data.name: SitelockRemoveNotImplemented
data.value: @SITELOCK/REMOVE modification is not yet implemented. Use the admin UI to remove sitelock rules.

data.name: SitelockRuleNotImplemented
data.value: @SITELOCK rule modification is not yet implemented. Use the admin UI to modify sitelock rules.

data.name: SitelockInvalidSyntax
data.value: Invalid @SITELOCK syntax. Use '@help @sitelock' for usage information.

data.name: ZonesClearedForOwnerFormat
data.value: Zones cleared for {0} object(s) owned by {1}.

data.name: ZoneSetForOwnerFormat
data.value: Zone set to {0} for {1} object(s) owned by {2}.

data.name: PollNoPollMessage
data.value: No poll message is currently set.

data.name: EnableDisableNotBooleanFormat
data.value: Option '{0}' is not a boolean option. Use @config/set instead.

data.name: RuntimeConfigNotImplemented
data.value: Runtime configuration modification is not yet implemented. Changes require server restart.
